title: Light-blue theme, corrected contact numbers, gallery washing-machine images, and 3D block ALL CAPS branding

requirements.summary: Apply a consistent clean light-blue theme across the entire site by updating global theme tokens.
acceptanceCriteria: The site background reads as light-blue (not warm/cream) across all sections.
Body text uses a dark/near-black color with sufficient contrast on the new light-blue backgrounds.
Cards, borders, and muted surfaces use cohesive light-blue-tinted neutrals (no remaining warm/cream surfaces).
Accent/primary colors remain readable and consistent with the light-blue theme across buttons, icons, and links.

file_operations.description: Update the :root OKLCH theme variables (e.g., --background, --muted, --card, --primary, --accent, --border and foreground counterparts) from the current warm/cream palette to a cohesive light-blue-tinted palette; ensure muted surfaces used by sections (e.g., bg-muted/20) read as light-blue and that foreground tokens remain dark/near-black for contrast.

requirements.summary: Update the displayed phone number site-wide to 98431 29760 and ensure all call actions dial the updated number.
acceptanceCriteria: `frontend/src/content/siteContent.ts` contains `businessInfo.phone` set to `98431 29760` exactly as displayed text.
All `tel:` links across the site dial the updated number (including Hero and Contact CTAs).
No other component displays the old phone number.

file_operations.description: Set businessInfo.phone to the exact display text `98431 29760` and remove any previous phone display value.
Ensure the Hero 'Call Now' tel link dials the updated number by deriving a sanitized tel href (digits-only) from businessInfo.phone while keeping the displayed text requirements intact.

Ensure all Contact section call actions (Phone link and CTA 'Call Now' button) dial the updated number by using a sanitized tel href derived from businessInfo.phone, while the displayed phone text remains `98431 29760`.

requirements.summary: Update WhatsApp number site-wide to the correct India E.164 digits-only value for wa.me links.
acceptanceCriteria: `businessInfo.whatsapp` is updated to an India E.164 digits-only value that corresponds to `98431 29760` (e.g., includes country code and no spaces).
All WhatsApp buttons/links across the site open a WhatsApp chat to the updated number.
No remaining WhatsApp link points to the previous number.

file_operations.description: Update businessInfo.whatsapp to an India E.164 digits-only value corresponding to `98431 29760` (e.g., `919843129760`) so that existing wa.me links open the correct chat.

requirements.summary: Add at least two new washing-machine-focused gallery images to the Gallery grid with appropriate alt text.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 2 new gallery images depicting washing machines in a laundry/dry-cleaning context are added to the Gallery data (`galleryImages`).
Each new gallery item has an appropriate English `alt` text describing the image content.
The Gallery section renders the new washing machine images without layout breakage across responsive breakpoints.

file_operations.description: Add the generated image asset file at the exact path `frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-washing-machine-1.dim_1200x800.jpg` so it can be referenced by the Gallery.
Add the generated image asset file at the exact path `frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-washing-machine-2.dim_1200x800.jpg` so it can be referenced by the Gallery.

Append at least two new entries to galleryImages referencing the new assets `frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-washing-machine-1.dim_1200x800.jpg` and `frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-washing-machine-2.dim_1200x800.jpg` (via their public `/assets/generated/...` paths) and include clear English alt text indicating washing machines in a laundry/dry-cleaning setting.

requirements.summary: Switch header/footer brand display to an ALL CAPS bold block-style 3D graphic while keeping the tagline readable and responsive.
acceptanceCriteria: Header branding displays the business name in ALL CAPS with a block-style 3D appearance.
Footer branding displays the business name in ALL CAPS with the same block-style 3D appearance.
The tagline text remains present and readable in both header and footer.
Branding remains responsive (does not overflow or break the header layout on mobile).

file_operations.description: Add the generated transparent brand graphic at `frontend/public/assets/generated/brand-3d-block.dim_1600x400.png` for use in the header and footer branding.

Create a reusable BrandMark component that renders the block-style 3D ALL CAPS brand image and a separate, readable tagline text; ensure it is responsive and suitable for both header and footer contexts. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Replace the current inline brand text with the new BrandMark component (using `frontend/public/assets/generated/brand-3d-block.dim_1600x400.png`) and keep the existing tagline present and readable; ensure layout remains compact and non-overflowing on mobile. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Replace the current footer brand heading text with the same BrandMark component to match the header’s block-style 3D ALL CAPS branding while keeping the tagline readable. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
